## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in Mnemic.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run benchmark` when recall, scoring, fixtures, or benchmark output changed
- [ ] `npm run ci:smoke` for release-facing or cross-package changes

## Memory Safety

- [ ] No secrets, customer data, private prompts, or production memory exports were committed.
- [ ] Memory examples use stable `sourceKey` values where appropriate.
- [ ] Policy, audit, or recall changes include docs/tests.

## Notes

Add screenshots, benchmark snippets, JSONL review notes, or migration details if useful.
